title: Smart Switch for Wide-Bandgap Devices
description:
Goals:
• Develop next-generation power IC architectures using advanced smart gate driver techniques to achieve ultra-fast transient response and ultra-low-noise control.• Ensure high loop stability in DrGaN switches through heterogeneous integration and advanced packaging.• Tackle physical and operational challenges through comprehensive thermal management and multi-physics analysis.• Implement device reliability and aging detection methodologies to guarantee longevity and safety.

title: Monolithic Novel IC Platform
description:
Goals:
• Design monolithic Driver GaN (DrGaN) solutions integrating driver ICs and GaN HEMTs.• Apply parasitic extraction and high-frequency layout optimization to mitigate switching ringing.• Prevent gate degradation caused by excessive ringing and switching stress.• Push frequency scaling while meeting stringent efficiency and thermal demands.

title: Wide-Bandgap Power Devices Multi-physics Sensing and Predictive Control
description:
Goals:
• Design ultra-fast over-current protection (OCP) and sensing circuits to minimize latency and prevent failures.• Utilize multi-physics modeling and thermal gradient analysis to correct sensing non-linearities.• Develop predictive control algorithms for safe and predictable operation.• Simplify aging diagnosis by accounting for temperature-induced switching variations.

title: Power Delivery for Next-Generation Computational Hardware
description:
Goals:
• Model and design high-efficiency coupled inductor HV-to-core architectures using advanced node IC design.• Develop robust control strategies based on Constant On-Time (CoT) and multi-phase current balancing.• Create accurate current sensing using SenseFET and DCR sensing methodologies.• Design novel on-chip passive filters to meet massive computational power demands.

Goals:
• Deploy specialized AI agents to automate real-time measurement analysis and dynamically adjust control parameters.• Develop unified generative models and neural-network-based predictive transient tuning.• Apply advanced optimization algorithms such as space partitioning, greedy random search, and hill climbing.• Benchmark AI-driven tuning against expert human performance to ensure target phase and gain margins.
